arts.ttl: “Interesting profile” – Intermediary speaks of club’s liking for Everton man, expects him to settle well
arts.sum: Dominic Calvert-Lewin’s current contract at Everton runs out in the summer of 2025. The Englishman has been a regular for the Toffees this season under Sean Dyche, playing 16 Premier League games. But he has scored only two goals and there has been no movement regarding a new deal for the striker. arts.ttl: Roma’s Christmas wishlist: Raspadori or Beto, and Ranieri’s hunt for a new manager
arts.sum: As the festive season approaches, Roma's Trigoria training ground is buzzing with renewed optimism under Claudio Ranieri's leadership. The recent victory against Parma has provided some much-needed relief after a challenging start to the season. However, Ranieri is already looking ahead, with transfer market reinforcements and a search for his successor topping his Christmas list. Four days ago, Italian journalist Gianluca Di Marzio reported Fiorentina have made a move to sign the striker in the winter market.
